game_name: Donkey Kong Country 3: Dixie Kong's Double Trouble!

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Cracked floor reveals, hidden switches, secret area access
Bouncing mechanics, enemy defeat from behind strategy
Bounce-back barrel mechanics required; must strike enemy shield from behind
Direct animal control instead of riding
Water suction and spray mechanics for enemy defeat
Collecting out-of-reach items via aerial assistance
Trading items, obtaining key progression items, Bear Coin economy
Multi-step solution requirements, team-up puzzle combinations
Conveyor mechanics, electrical hazards, advanced platforming

typical_relief_triggers: Overworld traversal between intense world sequences
typical_tension_triggers: Koin enemy encounters requiring precise barrel bounce timing
Factory level hazards and conveyor sequences
Water-based platforming with limited air supply
Multi-phase puzzle solutions with team-up throws
Boss battles in progressive world structure
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive difficulty curve with world-based intensity escalation; early worlds establish mechanics safely, mid-game worlds introduce complex puzzle combinations, late-game worlds emphasize hazard navigation and boss challenges

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Overworld exploration allows branching paths to optional worlds; vehicle gating creates soft progression barriers; Brothers Bear trading creates optional trading loops
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden switches and cracked floors revealed by Kong team-up throws; bonus coins scattered in non-obvious locations; DK Coins require specific enemy defeat mechanics

difficulty_curve.early_game: Safe introduction of Dixie/Kiddy mechanics; basic barrel cannon navigation; simple team-up throw puzzles; forest and cliff-side themed worlds with straightforward platforming
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of complex puzzle combinations; animal helper variety expansion; swimming levels with breath management; factory themes introduce conveyor and electrical hazards; overworld vehicle gating creates progression walls
difficulty_curve.late_game: Advanced obstacle chains combining multiple mechanics; mountain-top levels with intense platforming; KAOS Kore world with shuffled level order challenge; boss battle sequences requiring pattern recognition
notable_spikes: Transition to factory-themed worlds (World 5-6) introduces electrical hazards and conveyor complexity
KAOS Kore progression featuring rearranged internal level order creating unfamiliar challenge sequencing
Final KAOS boss robot destruction requiring sustained pattern execution

notable_level_patterns.description: Levels designed around Kong team-up mechanics where one character must throw the other to reveal hidden areas, cracked floors, or activate switches; creates cooperative problem-solving flow
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Multiple worlds feature this as primary progression mechanic

notable_level_patterns.description: Enemy encounters requiring player to calculate barrel bounce trajectories to strike Koins from behind; DK Coin acquisition locked behind this specific mechanic mastery
Specific animal companions unlock level sections; Ellie's water spray for fire-based obstacles, Parry for aerial item collection; encourages mechanic experimentation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Ellie introduced mid-game; Parry in later worlds

notable_level_patterns.description: Speedboat and hovercraft create non-linear overworld exploration; gated progression requires specific items obtained through Brothers Bear trading; creates meta-puzzle layer above level design
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Kremwood Forest and later worlds utilize vehicle gating

notable_level_patterns.description: Boss encounters across world themes; final KAOS robot boss requires sustained pattern execution; emphasizes progression readiness checking
notable_level_patterns.example_level: World culmination levels and Kastle KAOS
